basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan Police Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Office of the Director General of Police, Rajasthan has released the official notification for the recruitment of Young Professional posts across 5 domain areas. This recruitment drive offers 5 contractual vacancies, with 1 vacancy available in each domain at Police Headquarters, Jaipur. Eligible candidates can apply through online (email) or offline (by post) mode for a fixed period of 1 year with a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 45,000 per month.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 15 days of the date of publication in newspapers (exact closing date not specified in the notification)

age_limit.details: Candidates for all five posts must be below 32 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application.

qualification.details: Candidates in all five domains must be below 32 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application. Educational qualification and experience requirements differ by domain, as detailed below. | Crime Data Analyst: B.E./B.Tech; OR Professional degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Cyber Security, or Data Analytics | Monitoring of Naveen Nyay Samhitas: Preferably LL.M; OR B.A. LL.B., B.B.A. LL.B., or any equivalent integrated five-year programme | Road Safety Data Analyst: B.E./B.Tech; OR M.Sc/Post Graduate Diploma in Management; OR Professional degree in Data Analytics (preference to candidates with Highway Engineering as a core subject) | Drug Control Data Analyst: B.E./B.Tech; OR M.Sc/Post Graduate Diploma in Management; OR Professional degree in Data Analytics | Enabling AI in Policing: B.E./B.Tech; OR Professional degree in Artificial Intelligence or Machine Learning

vacancy_details.Domain Area: Monitoring of Implementation of Naveen Nyay Samhitas

post_wise_breakdown.domain_area: Monitoring of Implementation of Naveen Nyay Samhitas

salary_details.details: The consolidated remuneration for the Young Professional is fixed at Rs. 45,000 per month, uniform across all five domain areas. Selected candidates will not be paid any other financial benefits such as Medical Reimbursement, House Rent Allowance (HRA), or Transport Allowance, apart from this consolidated remuneration.

selection_process: Appointment will be made on contractual basis in accordance with the RTPP (Rajasthan Transparency in Public Procurement) Rules and Rajasthan Police policies. Selection will be through a suitability assessment comprising a Written Test
how_to_apply: Download and fill the application form as per the format given in Annexure-I of the notification.
Attach self-attested copies of all required supporting documents, arranged in the specified order: (i) filled application format, (ii) index of documents, (iii) copies of supporting documents.
Sign and number every page of the application, including supporting documents.

To apply online: Scan the entire application as a single PDF and email it to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of Young Professionals in Rajasthan Police from (name of the applicant)."

To apply offline: Submit the application in an envelope superscribed "Application for the post of Young Professionals in Rajasthan Police" at Room No. 217, Second Floor, Police Headquarters, Lalkothi, Jaipur, Rajasthan-302015.
Ensure the application reaches within 15 days of the date of publication of the notification in newspapers.
important_instructions: Applicants can apply for only one domain/task area per application, as indicated in the application form. Applicants/interested persons are advised to regularly check the departmental website, as any changes to this notification will be displayed there. Candidates should ensure they meet the age and qualification criteria for the specific domain before applying. The engagement is purely temporary/contractual for a fixed one-year period and does not guarantee permanent employment with Rajasthan Police.

content_sections.text: Note: The notification specifies the application window as "15 days from the date of publication in newspapers" rather than a fixed calendar date. Candidates should confirm the exact last date from the official notification or the departmental website.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates in all five domains must be below 32 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application. Educational qualification and experience requirements differ by domain, as detailed below.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Role Summary (Domain-Wise)
content_sections.text: Crime Data Analyst: Analyses state-wide crime data with a primary focus on crimes against women and children, identifies crime patterns, and prepares analytical reports for evidence-based policing. Monitoring of Naveen Nyay Samhitas: Monitors implementation and compliance of the Naveen Nyay Sanhitas (BNS, BNSS, and BSA) across the state, building compliance dashboards and tracking implementation progress. Road Safety Data Analyst: Analyses road accident data, identifies trends and risk factors, and recommends evidence-based interventions to reduce accidents. Drug Control Data Analyst: Analyses narcotics-related data to identify trends, patterns, and emerging threats, and recommends enforcement strategies. Enabling AI in Policing: Explores, evaluates, and implements Artificial Intelligence solutions to strengthen predictive policing and digital investigations.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates for all five posts must be below 32 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The consolidated remuneration for the Young Professional is fixed at Rs. 45,000 per month, uniform across all five domain areas. Selected candidates will not be paid any other financial benefits such as Medical Reimbursement, House Rent Allowance (HRA), or Transport Allowance, apart from this consolidated remuneration.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Appointment will be made on contractual basis in accordance with the RTPP (Rajasthan Transparency in Public Procurement) Rules and Rajasthan Police policies. Selection will be through a suitability assessment comprising a Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Terms and Conditions of Engagement
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be engaged on a full-time contractual basis for a fixed period of one year, and cannot take up any other assignment with any other agency, organisation, or employer during this period. Posting will be at Police Headquarters, Jaipur, under the guidance and supervision of Rajasthan Police officers. Selected candidates must furnish a Declaration of Fidelity and Secrecy in the prescribed format, given the confidential nature of information they may access during the engagement. On completion of the fixed one-year tenure, selected candidates must return all materials, files, data, e-mails, passwords, and other information in their possession, and sign an undertaking not to divulge any information encountered during the assignment, even after leaving. No TA/DA will be given for attending the written test, practical test, or interview, or for expenditure incurred to join the position. Leave is admissible at the rate of 1.5 days for each completed month on a pro-rata basis, with no accumulation of leave. The engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right to permanent absorption or regular appointment with Rajasthan Police. Rajasthan Police may terminate the engagement by giving 10 days' notice, including in cases where the candidate is unable to address assigned work, the quality of work is unsatisfactory, the work plan is not achieved on time, or the candidate is found lacking in honesty and integrity. The selected candidate may also terminate the engagement by serving a 10-day notice period.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Rajasthan Police Young Professional Application
content_sections.text: Duly filled application form (Annexure-I format, as prescribed in the notification) Index of the documents submitted Self-attested proof of identity issued by the concerned professional body of which the candidate is a member, or a Government ID such as PAN, Aadhaar, Driving Licence, or Voter ID Self-attested proof of date of birth Self-attested copies of all mark sheets of final examinations mentioned in the application Self-attested certificates of any other educational qualification Experience certificate from the employer on letterhead with contact details (for the period claimed), or an appointment letter with salary certificates covering the entire experience period Undertaking of self-employment, if applicable Each page of the application, including all supporting documents, must be duly signed and numbered.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Download and fill the application form as per the format given in Annexure-I of the notification. Attach self-attested copies of all required supporting documents, arranged in the specified order: (i) filled application format, (ii) index of documents, (iii) copies of supporting documents. Sign and number every page of the application, including supporting documents. To apply online: Scan the entire application as a single PDF and email it to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of Young Professionals in Rajasthan Police from (name of the applicant)." To apply offline: Submit the application in an envelope superscribed "Application for the post of Young Professionals in Rajasthan Police" at Room No. 217, Second Floor, Police Headquarters, Lalkothi, Jaipur, Rajasthan-302015. Ensure the application reaches within 15 days of the date of publication of the notification in newspapers.

content_sections.heading: Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applicants can apply for only one domain/task area per application, as indicated in the application form. Applicants/interested persons are advised to regularly check the departmental website, as any changes to this notification will be displayed there. Candidates should ensure they meet the age and qualification criteria for the specific domain before applying. The engagement is purely temporary/contractual for a fixed one-year period and does not guarantee permanent employment with Rajasthan Police.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 5 vacancies in total - 1 each in Crime Data Analysis, Monitoring of Naveen Nyay Samhitas, Road Safety, Drug Control, and AI in Policing.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary of a Young Professional in Rajasthan Police?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration is fixed at Rs. 45,000 per month, with no additional allowances such as HRA or Transport Allowance.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Rajasthan Police Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be below 32 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for Rajasthan Police Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted within 15 days of the date the notification is published in newspapers. The notification does not specify a fixed calendar closing date.

faq.question: Q5. Is Rajasthan Police Young Professional a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is purely contractual for a fixed period of one year and does not confer any right to permanent absorption or regular appointment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Rajasthan Police Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is through a suitability assessment comprising a Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I apply for Rajasthan Police Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: Applications can be sent online via email to [email protected], or offline by post to Room No. 217, Second Floor, Police Headquarters, Lalkothi, Jaipur, Rajasthan-302015.
